#  The home of ion trap  quantum computing

AQT realises the first general-purpose quantum computer.

#  The home of ion trap  quantum computing
# Innsbruck . Austria
AQT realises the first general-purpose quantum computer.
[Read more](https://www.aqt.eu/marmot/)
Innovation. Future. Turn-key Quantum.
## Leverage our quantum computer to tackle challenges in finance, chemistry, logistics, and beyond.
## Leverage our quantum computer to tackle challenges in finance, chemistry, logistics, and beyond.
We offer fully functional trapped-ion quantum computers, ready for integration into existing high-performance computing (HPC) data centre installations, and cloud accessibility. One entire quantum computer requires only two full custom 19-inch racks, runs in a comfortable room temperature environment and consumes less than 2kW of power.
![Solutions Alpine Quantum Technoligies](https://www.aqt.eu/wp-content/uploads/blank.png)

Our quantum computer
## The world’s leading 19-inch rack-mounted quantum computer
AQT’s quantum computer is characterised by its innovative and proven architecture, as well as its modularity and expandability. The system has demonstrated the highest quantum volume in Europe so far and applications in numerous quantum computing use cases. Furthermore, the system operates at room temperature and consumes less than two kilowatts of electrical power, eliminating the need for special cooling, water, or extensive energy infrastructure.
[Read more](https://www.aqt.eu/products/#quantum-computer)
![MARMOT](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='1200'%20height='1200'%3E%3Crect%20width='100%25'%20height='100%25'%20opacity='0'/%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![AQT Components](https://www.aqt.eu/wp-content/uploads/blank.png)
Our instruments
## Experience high-performance hardware
Speed up and increase the performance of your research using:
  * [PINE SET-UP](https://www.aqt.eu/pine-set-up/) – the leading modular trapped ion architecture
  * [BEECH](https://www.aqt.eu/beech/) – perfect for laser stabilisation in demanding applications
  * [ROWAN](https://www.aqt.eu/products/rowan/) – generation and full control of laser light pulses


[Read more](https://www.aqt.eu/products/)
Cloud access
## Deploy your algorithm through our ARNICA cloud service
Access to AQT’s latest quantum computers and simulators, providing you on-demand, high performance and reproducible quantum computing with a universal gate set. Quantum computing opens up novel possibilities for algorithm design.
[Quantum SDK connectors for ARNICA](https://www.aqt.eu/#9fb4fe2dbb4f563c8)
Simple integration with industry-standard quantum software tools and workflows is realised with dedicated ARNICA connectors for various quantum SDKs.
[Quantum simulator for AQT quantum computers](https://www.aqt.eu/#bdffcbe5980e764d8)
Get started easily, offline and for free. We offer a high-quality offline simulator for prototyping quantum circuits and algorithms, and exploring their performance under realistic environment conditions, which makes porting code to our quantum computers seamless.
[Examine the API documentation of the ARNICA interface](https://www.aqt.eu/#be5ae7313bc195be4)
Enjoy seamless integration by obtaining direct access to ARNICA without the need for an SDK connector.
[Read more](https://www.aqt.eu/products/#cloud-access)
![Cloud Access ](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='1200'%20height='1300'%3E%3Crect%20width='100%25'%20height='100%25'%20opacity='0'/%3E%3C/svg%3E)
#####  News & insights
  * [ ![LYNX Series with Record-Breaking Quantum Volume](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='650'%20height='434'%3E%3Crect%20width='100%25'%20height='100%25'%20opacity='0'/%3E%3C/svg%3E) ](https://www.aqt.eu/lynx-quantum-computer-series/)
#### [New “LYNX” Quantum Computer Series with Record-Breaking Quantum Volume](https://www.aqt.eu/lynx-quantum-computer-series/)
AQT’s unveils the LYNX Series, a new generation of 19-inch rack-mounted quantum computers that has officially achieved a record-breaking Quantum Volume (QV) of 32768. This sets a new milestone for a universal Quantum Computer that is designed, built, and located in Europe.
[Read more](https://www.aqt.eu/lynx-quantum-computer-series/)
  * [ ![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='650'%20height='434'%3E%3Crect%20width='100%25'%20height='100%25'%20opacity='0'/%3E%3C/svg%3E) ](https://www.aqt.eu/presidents-visit-aqt/)
#### [We had the honour of welcoming the President of Germany, Frank-Walter Steinmeier, and the President of Austria, Alexander Van der Bellen, to AQT.](https://www.aqt.eu/presidents-visit-aqt/)
The focus of the visit was an ambitious vision put forward by Federal Presidents Steinmeier and Van der Bellen: “Europe must and can reinvent itself!”
[Read more](https://www.aqt.eu/presidents-visit-aqt/)

## Privacy Preference
We need your consent before you can continue on our website.
We use cookies and other technologies on our website. Some of them are essential, while others help us to improve this website and your experience.
Personal data may be processed (e.g. IP addresses), for example for personalized ads and content or ad and content measurement.
You can find more information about the use of your data in our [privacy policy](https://www.aqt.eu/privacy-policy/).
There is no obligation to consent to the processing of your data in order to use this offer.
You can revoke or adjust your selection at any time under [Settings](https://www.aqt.eu/).
Please note that based on individual settings not all functions of the site may be available.
Some services process personal data in the USA. With your consent to use these services, you also consent to the processing of your data in the USA pursuant to Art. 49 (1) lit. a GDPR. The ECJ classifies the USA as a country with insufficient data protection according to EU standards. For example, there is a risk that U.S. authorities will process personal data in surveillance programs without any existing possibility of legal action for Europeans.
The following is a list of service groups for which consent can be given. The first service group is essential and cannot be unchecked.
  * Essential
  * Statistics
  * External Media
